source: Parsed ncpcli current-devices capture from /Users/arjrr/.codex/memories/jbp.txt plus user-pasted rendered Confluence content for JBP15 and JBP19 multi-planar bootstrap pages.
fabric_scope: JBP planar / AI2ND inventory snapshot from ncpcli baseline current devices

bootstrap_sequence: Bootstrap QFABT0 racks based on placement groups
Validate QFABT0 <> QFABT1, place QFABT0 in-service
Repeat QFABT0 bootstrap and validation for all placement groups; pasted page states there are 64 placement groups
assumptions: Live counts and parsed device rows are still derived from jbp.txt current-devices -va.
Design rack counts, connection counts, bootstrap sequence, and placement groups are derived from user-pasted rendered Confluence content.

Placement-group rack SKU assignment follows the pasted SKU order where explicit; otherwise the two qfabt0 racks are the listed net.ad_spc4_planar_qfab_t0_1.01 positions and the remaining racks are GPU_GB300_NVL72_R.03.

QFABT1.notes: 128 devices per plane; 8 devices per rack

QFABT0.notes: 256 devices per plane; 8 devices per rack

GPU.notes: 18 compute trays per rack; 72 GPUs per rack

qfabt0_to_gpus.per_switch: 126 x 200G on each switch for GB300

engineer_sequence: Bootstrap QFABT0 racks based on Placement Group (2 racks)
Validate QFABT0 <> QFABT1 links (1024 total for 16k cluster per placement group)
recommended_approach: Ensure CFAB T0 and T1/T2 racks are built and in deployed state for the placement group
Place QFABT0 devices in-service for Placement Group
Repeat the steps for each Placement Group
cpv_minimal_footprint_sequence: Bootstrap QFABT0 racks based on Placement Group (2 racks)
Ensure CFAB T0 and T1/T2 racks are built and in deployed state for the placement group
Validate QFABT0 <> host connections 2016 per Placement Group
Commence CPV testing for placement group
Place QFABT1 and IPR in-service
Repeat the steps for each Placement Group
Validate QFABT0 <> QFABT1 links 1024 total for 16k cluster per placement group
Ensure CPV tests are localized to QFABT0 <> GPU
Bootstrap QFABT1 spine racks
Validate IPR <> QFABT1 links
Place QFABT0 devices in-service for Placement Group

live_device_collection.device_scope: all rows returned by update-device-list --ncp-baselined-devices followed by current-devices -va

anomalies: Parsed jbp.txt current-devices rows match the reported ncpcli role-count footer.
No qfabip rows were present in the jbp.txt capture; observed qfabric inventory contains qfabt0 and qfabt1 only.
JBP15 observed qfabric rows from jbp.txt are all in states: deployed.
JBP19 observed qfabric rows from jbp.txt are all in states: deployed.
JBP15/JBP19 connector fetches still failed, but user-pasted rendered Confluence text was used to populate design and bootstrap sections.
JBP19 pasted rack count table lists Total as 121, while category rack counts and placement rows add to 161; both values are retained.

JBP15 pasted placement table has a duplicated placement-group label 20; the second row is stored as placement_group 21 with source_placement_group_label 20 because the CPV note says placement group 21 and the table continues at 22.
JBP15 pasted placement rows include several notes that qfabt0 devices are in another CFAB block; these are preserved in per-placement-group notes.
